case_title: TORY N. FRANCISCO et al VS. LINDSEY TROWBRIDGE

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TROWBRIDGE, LINDSEY
